message:
chore(wasm): update TypeScript definitions for dot plot exports

index.d.ts:
- Add DotPlotBuffers class with free(), direct, inverted, bins, window
- Add dotplot_self_buffers function signature
- Add SequenceHandle.dotplot_self method signature
- Document WASM memory management requirement (must call .free())

pkg/wasm_compute.d.ts:
- Add SequenceHandle.dotplot_self method from wasm-bindgen output
- Add InitInput, InitOutput types for WASM instantiation
- Add all __wbg_* FFI function signatures for completeness

These type definitions enable TypeScript consumers to use the new
dot plot functionality with full type safety.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
